arts.ttl: Cole Palmer fires clear six-word Chelsea promise as Enzo Maresca tells him what he must do
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca is not concerned with Palmer's form in front of goal and believes it is completely normal what his star man is going through - pointing out that he is indeed a human being. In his debut season at Stamford Bridge, the England attacker - who is set to be a prominent figure under new Three Lions manager Thomas Tuchel - scored an astonishing 25 goals and produced 15 assists in all competitions.

arts.ttl: 'I will be': Cole Palmer makes promise to Chelsea fans as drought continues following Southampton blank
arts.sum: Even though Chelsea picked up a much-needed victory over Southampton on Tuesday night, Cole Palmer may have been left disappointed by his contribution. Chelsea recorded...

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Aston Villa rival Chelsea & Arsenal for €50million attacker transfer
arts.sum: Aston Villa are set to enter the market for a new striker in the summer, with Porto front-man Samu Aghehowa emerging as a transfer target to replace Jhon Duran. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that the talented young Spain international is on Villa’s radar, along with long-time admirers such […] The post Exclusive: Aston Villa rival Chelsea & Arsenal for €50million attacker transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: “We’ll see” – Maresca not inspiring confidence that Chelsea can keep hold of star man
arts.sum: Chelsea’s season is in danger of falling below expectations yet again, and Enzo Maresca hasn’t inspired confidence that the Blues will be able to keep hold of one player in particular. It’s being reported that the board are losing confidence in Maresca already, despite only having employed him from the start of the current campaign, […] The post “We’ll see” – Maresca not inspiring confidence that Chelsea can keep hold of star man appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Maresca finds Chelsea’s No.9 and praises ‘PERFECT’ Palmer after Southampton misses
arts.sum: Chelsea manager Enzo Maresca has offered a defence of Cole Palmer as he goes through a difficult spell while praising a “fantastic” option he has found for the false 9 role at Stamford Bridge. Chelsea dismantled Southampton 4-0 at home in the Premier League on Tuesday but Palmer’s name was notably absent from the scoresheet, despite the forward having two huge opportunities to score.

arts.ttl: 'He's got a future ahead of him': Levi Colwill says Chelsea have a truly 'amazing' youngster in their ranks
arts.sum: Chelsea are back on track in the Premier League after making light work of Southampton at Stamford Bridge on Tuesday night. The Blues’ form hasn’t...

arts.ttl: Chelsea unleash Enzo Maresca secret weapon as newest star delivers message that can't be ignored
arts.sum: Replacing Pedro Neto, he constantly tried to advance play with his direct dribbling and showed the drive to try and score or get a goal for his team every time he got the ball It is here that the Cobham graduate still has to develop but it is here that he shows a side to Chelsea that Enzo Maresca can use more. In someone like George, and by extension the youth options named on the bench on Tuesday, Maresca has a group of talented and ready players to bring joy and earn support.

arts.ttl: ‘I will change you’: Enzo Maresca explains why he threatened to take Filip Jorgensen off in Chelsea’s win vs Southampton
Cole Palmer breaks silence on recent slump in form - as he sends message to Chelsea fans after Southampton thrashing
arts.sum: Palmer has failed to score or assist across his past seven games in all competitions, with the 21-year-old undergoing what seems to be his first dip for the club.
